name: Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings Ltd.
business: Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings Ltd. operates a global cruise business with three brands: Norwegian Cruise Line, Oceania Cruises, and Regent Seven Seas Cruises. It sells cruise vacations to consumers, offering itineraries to worldwide destinations. The company also generates onboard revenue from casinos, beverage sales, shore excursions, and other services.

exposures.sentence: We are a leading global cruise company which operates the Norwegian Cruise Line, Oceania Cruises and Regent Seven Seas Cruises brands.
Onboard and other revenue primarily consists of revenue from casinos, beverage sales, shore excursions, specialty dining, retail sales, spa services and Wi-Fi services.
The insurance we carry includes: ... insurance for our shoreside property, cybersecurity, directors and officers, general liability risks and other insurance coverages.
Designs for the final two Prima Class ships have been lengthened and reconfigured to accommodate the use of green methanol as a future fuel source.

catalysts.sentence: These amenities will be enhanced in the summer of 2026 with the opening of the Great Tides Waterpark with 19 waterslides, an 800-foot dynamic river and additional experiences.

catalysts.event: Charter agreement for Norwegian Sky begins
catalysts.sentence: the Company executed long-term charter agreements, each inclusive of purchase options, for Norwegian Sky beginning in 2026 and Norwegian Sun beginning in 2027.

catalysts.event: Bareboat charter for Seven Seas Navigator completion
catalysts.sentence: we are currently negotiating a bareboat charter with a purchase option for Seven Seas Navigator, which is expected to be completed before the end of the first quarter of 2026.

Covered entities were required to procure and surrender allowances equivalent to 40% of their verified carbon emissions from 2024, with the amount increasing to 70% of carbon emissions from 2025 and 100% of GHG emissions from 2026, with allowances to be surrendered by September in the following year.
